findings.description: The server discloses it is running Apache version 2.4.25. This information helps attackers identify known vulnerabilities for this specific version.
findings.solution: Configure Apache to suppress version information. Suppress the Server/X-Powered-By headers.
findings.recommendation: Hide Apache version disclosure in server configuration.
findings.business_impact: Version disclosure aids attackers in identifying and exploiting known CVEs for the specific software version in use.
